title: Vietnamese Chicken Noodle Soup
description: A light and flavorful Vietnamese-inspired chicken noodle soup made with smoked chicken, mildly seasoned vegetables, and fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: Chicken breast
ingredients.notes: Smoked chicken can be substituted for regular chicken

instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the sliced ginger and chopped onion to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the smoked chicken breast to the pot and cook until heated through.
Add the carrots and celery to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the noodles to the pot and cook according to package instructions.
Stir in the fish sauce and soy sauce (if using).
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
